title: Respect reduced motion in mobile tab navigation
description: Avoid forced smooth scrolling for the mobile tab bar when the user has prefers-reduced-motion enabled, and make current-page labels explicit for screen readers.

title: Add stale health response diagnostics to workspace status cards
description: When backend health payloads are malformed or stale, show content-type/body-shape diagnostics instead of a generic unavailable state.

title: Create focused test include rules for Vitest
description: Exclude Playwright e2e specs and TAP-style Odysseus tests from unit-test collection so pnpm test reflects actual unit failures rather than environment collection gaps.

title: Add command palette empty-state recovery actions
description: When command search has no matches, offer quick links to common workspace areas and a clear reset button.
